papers.title: VRN1 regulates heading and plant height in wheat by activating gibberellin biosynthesis
papers.authors: Liu T, Li D, Xie Z, et al

papers.title: Modulating plant growth-metabolism coordination for sustainable agriculture
papers.authors: Li S, Tian Y, Wu K, Ye Y, Yu J, Zhang J, Liu Q, Hu M, Li H, Tong Y, Harberd NP, Fu X

papers.title: Molecular characteristics and regulatory effects of dwarfing Rht genes in Triticum aestivum L
papers.authors: Wang YR, Shi J, He YY, et al

edges.mechanism: VRN1 binds TaGA20ox2 promoter and activates GA biosynthesis after vernalization
edges.evidence_sentence: VRN1 binds to and activates the TaGA20ox2 promoter

edges.mechanism: VRN1 promotes plant height via GA biosynthesis activation; VRN1-5A/5B/5D redundantly regulate height
edges.evidence_sentence: VRN1-5A/5B/5D redundantly regulate heading date and plant height in wheat; the plant height of these mutants was reduced by 3.7-5 cm compared with that of Fielder

edges.mechanism: GRF4 promotes growth, carbon fixation, nitrogen assimilation; antagonises DELLA
edges.evidence_sentence: GRF4 promotes and integrates nitrogen assimilation, carbon fixation and growth, whereas DELLA inhibits these processes

edges.mechanism: DELLA inhibits GRF4 by physical interaction; restricts growth and N-uptake
edges.evidence_sentence: The balanced opposing activities and physical interactions of the GROWTH-REGULATING FACTOR 4 (GRF4) transcription factor and the growth inhibitor DELLA confer homeostatic co-regulation of growth

edges.mechanism: GRF4 activates nitrogen assimilation genes; drives NUE
edges.evidence_sentence: GRF4 promotes and integrates nitrogen assimilation, carbon fixation and growth

edges.mechanism: Increased N-uptake supports growth and stem elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: grain yield are increased by tipping the GRF4-DELLA balance towards increased GRF4 abundance

edges.mechanism: Rht3 (= Rht-B1c) allele on 4BS, GA-insensitive DELLA; ~64% height reduction
Rht5 on 3BS; P450-family mechanism (likely GA biosynthesis); ~50% reduction
Rht26 on 3DL; PMEI (pectin methylesterase inhibitor) class affecting cell wall

perturbations.evidence_sentence: the plant height of these mutants was reduced by 3.7-5 cm compared with that of Fielder
perturbations.notes: VRN1-5A/B/D single homeolog mutants delayed heading and shorter

perturbations.evidence_sentence: VRN1-5A/5B/5D redundantly regulate heading date and plant height in wheat
perturbations.notes: Triple loss delays flowering and dwarfs plants

perturbations.evidence_sentence: increased GRF4 abundance boosts grain yield and NUE of rice and wheat GRVs without increasing mature plant height
perturbations.notes: GRF4 OE in Rht-B1b background boosts yield without extra height
Tom Thumb severe dwarf = Rht-B1c allele
